case_title: WILLIAM J BRYAN VS. JOHN RABKIN MD et al

docket_entries.description: MALPRACTICE - MEDICAL/DENTAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRYAN, WILLIAM J C-56996 AS TO DEFENDANT RABKIN MD, JOHN SAHOTA MD, GURDEEP ST. MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER SUTTER MEMORIAL HOSPITAL DOES 1 TO 25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-17-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-18-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-02-2012
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRYAN, WILLIAM J C-56996 HEARING SET FOR JAN-04-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JAN-04-2012 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT WILLIAM BRYAN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS IS CONTINUED FROM JAN-04-2012 TO JAN-18-2012, 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206, ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. (206)
ORDER ON COURT FEE WAIVER (NOTICE ON CONTINUED HEARING DATE)
REJECT LETTER THE COURT CANNOT FILE CORRESPONDENCE. IF YOU WISH TO VACATE COURT DATES AND DISMISS YOUR ACTION IN THIS COURT, PLEASE FILL OUT, SERVE AND FILE THE ENCLOSED REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL FORM.

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-18-2012 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF WILLIAM BRYAN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO PLAINTIFF WILLIAM J. BRYAN
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-17-2012 CONTINUED TO APR-20-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-20-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR - DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
